**Lecture codes**

Flavio Lozano Isla <flozanoisla@gmail.com>

---

## Datasets


### Potato WUE

> https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/15r7ZwcZZHbEgltlF6gSFvCTFA-CFzVBWwg3mFlRyKPs/edit?gid=1263018298#gid=1263018298

### GerminaR

> https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1QziIXGOwb8cl3GaARJq6Ez6aU7vND_UHKJnFcAKx0VI/edit?gid=735494081#gid=735494081
